prompt: A photorealistic studio portrait of a young Asian woman. She has long, wavy dark hair, light freckles, and a subtle glisten of sweat on her skin for a fresh, athletic appearance. She is wearing an all-white tennis outfit with a fitted short-sleeved polo shirt and a pleated mini skirt. She holds a white tennis racket resting casually over her right shoulder, looking directly at the camera with a calm expression. The setting is a seamless, bright white studio backdrop with soft, high-key lighting.
